title: Score Schema
description: Schema for scoring and evaluation metrics in the Traigent platform

Score.description: A score value, which can be numeric, string, or boolean

result_id.description: Reference to the ID of the result being scored (from agent_response_schema.json)

calculator_id.description: Reference to the ID of the calculator that produced this score (from IScoreCalculator)

score_type.description: Reference to the type of score (corresponds to measure_type in measure_schema.json)

additionalProperties.description: Map of calculator_id to IScore objects

scores.description: Map of result_id to scores by calculator

unscored_results.description: Set of result IDs that have not been scored yet

ScoreCollection.description: Collection of scores across multiple results and calculators

score_type.description: Type of score this calculator produces (corresponds to measure_type in measure_schema.json)

IScoreCalculator.description: Interface for calculating scores for agent responses

oneOf.description: ID of the score to be weighted (for existing scores)

weight.description: Weight factor to apply to this score (default: 1.0)

WeightedComponent.description: A score component with optional weighting

AggregationType.description:
Type of aggregation:
- within_measure: Aggregating scores of the same measure across multiple samples
- across_measures: Aggregating scores of different measures into a combined score
- across_time: Aggregating scores of the same measure across different time periods
- hierarchical: Aggregating scores in a hierarchical structure (e.g., sub-categories into categories)

AggregationOperation.description:
Statistical operation used for aggregation:
- mean: Arithmetic mean (average)
- weighted_mean: Weighted arithmetic mean
- median: Middle value
- mode: Most frequent value
- sum: Sum of values
- min: Minimum value
- max: Maximum value
- count: Count of values
- standard_deviation: Standard deviation
- variance: Statistical variance
- percentile: Percentile value (requires additional parameters)
- geometric_mean: Geometric mean
- harmonic_mean: Harmonic mean
- root_mean_square: Root mean square (quadratic mean)
- f_score: F-score (weighted harmonic mean of precision and recall)
- custom: Custom aggregation method (requires additional parameters)

component_scores.description: The individual scores that were aggregated

operation_parameters.description: Additional parameters for the aggregation operation (e.g., percentile value, beta for F-score)

score_type.description: Type of the aggregated score (corresponds to measure_type in measure_schema.json)

AggregatedScore.description: Represents an aggregated score computed from multiple individual scores

score_type.description: Type of score these statistics describe (corresponds to measure_type in measure_schema.json)

sample_size.description: Number of samples included in the statistics

statistics.description: Statistical measurements (keys are statistic names like 'mean', 'median', values are computed statistics)

counts.description: Count of scores in each bin

lower.description: Lower bound of the confidence interval

upper.description: Upper bound of the confidence interval

AggregatedStatistics.description: Comprehensive statistical analysis of a collection of scores

description: Score data structure for the Traigent platform
